plugins.name: statusline
plugins.description: Status line: git branch + worktree + ANSI colors, context/effort segments.

plugins.name: ctx-tokens
plugins.description: Read current context token usage from the live session transcript.

plugins.name: handoff
plugins.description: Save a session handoff to disk and restore it in a fresh session by id (/handoff, /handon <id>).

plugins.name: ctx-limit
plugins.description: Per-session context-size limit: past the threshold a hook blocks the prompt, warns, or runs a command. Pairs with molt. Run /ctx-limit.

plugins.name: molt
plugins.description: Context-limit orchestrator: shed a full context into a handoff and continue in a fresh session via /clear + auto-restore. Run /molt.

plugins.name: junk-drawer
plugins.description: Cheatsheet of the whole marketplace: every plugin with its version, description, and commands + params. Run /junk-drawer.
